titleStmt.title: SII 22.406: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 406. (A.R. No. 406 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, PERUNDUṞAI (near TIRUMAYYAM) SATYANĀRĀYAṆA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL TRIBH. KULASĒKHARADĒVA—13+9th YEAR

summary.p: Uninscribed stone is built into the body of this inscription and its continuation is lost. It seems to record a gift of some pieces of land made tax-free to the temple of Tyāgamīkāma-Viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ at Perunduṟai by Kaṇḍaṉ Āḷuḍaiyāṉ Kalvāyil-Nāḍālvāṉ, the chief who figures in No. 405 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulacekarate[ vaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3]- vatiṉ Etir 9vatu kāṉaṉāṭāṉa virutarājapuyaṅkara vaḷaṉāṭṭu peruntuṟai tirumeṟkoyil tiyākamikāma viṇṇakar remperumāṉukku ciri kaṇṭaṉ Āḷu
ṭaiyāṉāṉa kalvāyil nāṭāḻvāṉeṉ Iv Emperumāṉukku Iṟaiyili kalveṭṭikkuṭutta nilamāvatu taṭimiti cūlam ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻak kāṉaṉāṭṭu veḷāṉukkāṉa nāṭu kiḻavaṉ nālil Oṉṟu nilam kāṇi muntirikai kiḻmākāṇi
yum veḷāṉ cuntarattoḷaṉ Alaṅkāra vayakkal nilam kāle Araik kāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkāle muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum veḷḷai vayakkal vaṭak kaṭaiya muṉṟil Oṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻ Eṭṭu mā mukkāṇiyum U
kāyoṭu kuṟai nālil Oṉṟu nilam muntirikaik kiḻaraiye muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum veḷāṉ colai kūṭal veyattumpai nilam Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiye muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum pūcal kāṅkeyaṉāṉa kāliṅkarāyar vi
laikoṇṭu viṭṭa kiḻatti vayakkal kamuku nilam kāṇiyum Eṭṭiyaṉ kāviti ṅ kiḻmukkālum piḷḷaiyār periyāṉ koṉṟaicey nilam kāle muntirikai kiḻḻaraiye mākāṇip pāṇṭiveḷāṉ kāviti cuvar*Stops here. Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 22.406 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
